title: Welcome | Polyglot Dev Atlas
description: A modular tool designed for polyglot developers to compare programming languages and follow structured learning paths.

content.text: The Polyglot Developer Atlas is built to help you navigate multiple programming environments simultaneously. Whether you are a systems engineer moving to web dev, or a scripter moving to low-level memory management, this tool provides the bridges you need.

In Atlas mode, you can select one or two programming languages from the top bar to see side-by-side comparisons of syntax, logic, and memory management. It acts as a live reference sheet for your daily coding tasks.

Course mode transforms the atlas into a structured learning roadmap. It guides you through the fundamental concepts of programming step-by-step, ensuring you understand the 'why' behind the syntax in every language.
1. Use the **Mode Switcher** in the header to jump between the Atlas and the Courses.
2. Select your languages in the **Selector Bar** to trigger comparison views.
3. Use the **Left Sidebar** to change pages and the **Right Sidebar** to focus on specific topics within a page.
4. Toggle the **Sidebars** using the edge buttons (◀/▶) to clear the view for deep code reading.
